personality: 6 Glass / Luxe (Dark mode) mixed with 3 Editorial Mobile (Light mode)
personality_one_liner: A cinematic, expensive, and precise command center that balances the prestige of luxury jewelry with the ruthless efficiency of a manufacturing ERP.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room for luxury feel, balanced with tight grid alignment for dense ledger data. Never cramp rows.

do's: Use glass on the bottom tab bar and sticky headers to create cinematic depth over scrolling ledgers.
Use translucent tinted backgrounds under primary metrics/balances.
Use on featured order cards floating over background images.
dont's: Do not apply glass to body content, individual ledger rows, or form fields.
Never blur dense operational data where clarity is required.

screens.name: Login
screens.purpose: Secure, luxurious entry point with cinematic abstract background.
screens.layout: Full-bleed abstract background image. A gradient scrim ensures contrast. Form fields (email/password) sit inside a frosted glass card or a dark elevated surface in the bottom 40%. Primary CTA is a large, wide Gold button.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: A live operational command center prioritizing primary balances and real-time metrics.
screens.layout: Header with 'GoldSmith Pro' logo. Top section: Ledger-first visualization. A large hero card showing combined 'Gold Balance' in grams using Cormorant Garamond, with subtle gold noise/gradient background. Below: A 2-column grid of KPI cards (Running Orders, Today's Jobs, Monthly Revenue). Horizontal scroll for secondary balances (Silver, Diamond). Section for 'Pending Deliveries' as a succinct list.

screens.name: Clients
screens.purpose: List of Wholesalers, Retailers, and Suppliers for quick access and management.

states.empty: Empty state illustration with 'Add Client' CTA

screens.layout: Sticky header with Search bar and segmented control (Wholesalers | Retail | Suppliers). List items feature a leading initial avatar in a gold-tinted circle, client name, and a trailing chevron. Generous padding for high-end feel.

screens.name: Client Detail
screens.purpose: Comprehensive profile and ledger breakdown per client.
screens.layout: Cover banner (gradient or subtle pattern). Sticky profile header with name and primary actions (Call, Email). Below is a scrollable horizontal tab bar (Dashboard, Orders, Gold Ledger, Silver Ledger, Cash Ledger, Invoices). The Gold Ledger tab shows karat breakdown (9K-24K) with gross/net/fine calculations in clean, monospaced-aligned rows. Uses divider tokens between rows.

screens.name: Orders
screens.purpose: Filterable list of all manufacturing orders.
screens.layout: List view. Each card shows Order ID, Client Name, Metal/Karat, and a visual progress bar or pill showing current stage (e.g., 'Stone Setting'). Subtle borders (0.5pt) to define cards without heavy shadows.

screens.name: Order Detail & Job Card
screens.purpose: Complete breakdown of an order, its manufacturing stages, and QR for tracking.
screens.layout: Top section: High-quality product image or placeholder with gradient scrim. Order metadata (Weight, Karat, Client). Middle section: A vertical timeline (stage tracker) from 'Order Received' down to 'Delivered' with checkmarks/active states. Bottom section: QR code for quick floor scanning. Sticky bottom CTA 'Update Stage' or 'Assign Karigar'.

screens.name: Karigar Management
screens.purpose: Track artisan performance and material issuance.
screens.layout: List of Karigars. Detail view shows 'Gold Issued', 'Gold Returned', and 'Wastage Balance' in clear, side-by-side metric blocks. History of assigned jobs below.

screens.name: Inventory & Notifications
screens.layout: Inventory: List of metals and stones with stock levels. Low stock items highlighted with `warning` or `error` colors softly tinted. Notifications: Simple list with unread indicators.

login_hero.alt: Abstract gold and black luxury texture background

instructions_to_main_agent: Adhere STRICTLY to the Dark/Light palette logic provided. The aesthetic is 'Glass / Luxe' in dark mode (deep obsidian with antique gold) and 'Editorial' in light mode (paper white with gold).
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for all large numbers, balances, and primary headers to evoke luxury and precision. Use 'Satoshi' for body text, ledgers, and tabular data.
Ledger-first visualization is key: The Dashboard must feature a prominent, large-type hero section displaying Gold/Silver balance.
For tabular data (Gold Ledgers, Invoices), use monospaced or right-aligned numeric columns. Rely on spacing and subtle 0.5pt dividers instead of heavy grid lines.
Order Stage Tracker: Build a vertical timeline component for the 12-stage manufacturing process. Active stages should use the `brandPrimary` color.
Glassmorphism: Use blur/glass effects on sticky headers, tab bars, and the login modal to create depth. Ensure text readability with tinted underlays.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000) for surfaces; stick to the `#0A0A0A` and `#151515` tokens provided.
Ensure all interactive elements (pills, buttons) have a minimum touch target of 44x44pt.
Ensure there's a gradient scrim underneath text when placed on top of images (e.g., login screen).
